highlights.text: Grand Palace, Wat Pho & Coral Island speedboat
VIP airport fast-track & private luxury van throughout

itinerary.title: Bangkok Pattaya Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Bangkok • Grand Palace • Pattaya Beach • Coral Island
itinerary.overview: The Best Bangkok Pattaya Tour Package — iconic metropolitan heritage with serene coastal joy. Grand Palace, Coral Island private speedboat, and TRAGUIN premium logistics across 5 days.
itinerary.seo_title: TH-001 | Bangkok Pattaya Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04N/05D Thailand family package (TH-001): Grand Palace, Wat Pho, Pattaya, and Coral Island speedboat.

days.title: Bangkok Arrival & Sunset Orientation
days.description: VIP fast-track reception at Suvarnabhumi Airport. Private luxury van to premium city hotel. Afternoon city orientation drive and curated welcome dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport fast-track, panoramic city orientation drive
Evening Experience: Relaxed family welcome dinner
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Premium Family-Friendly Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Curated International Welcome Dinner

days.title: Bangkok Heritage & Iconic Temples
days.description: Grand Palace, Wat Phra Kaew, and Wat Pho Reclining Buddha. Afternoon premium retail and riverside dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Grand Palace, Wat Phra Kaew, Wat Pho, premium retail center
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Premium Family-Friendly Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Traditional Thai Fine Dining Lunch

days.title: Bangkok to Pattaya Coastal Escape
days.description: Scenic private van along Gulf of Thailand to Pattaya beachfront resort. Evening Pattaya night market walk.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private luxury van transit, beach orientation
Evening Experience: Pattaya night market walking tour
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Seaside Family Dinner

days.title: Coral Island Marine Expedition
days.description: Private luxury speedboat to Coral Island with snorkeling and beach relaxation. Farewell seafood lunch.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private speedboat to Coral Island, beach relaxation, reef snorkeling
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Beachside Seafood Buffet Lunch

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final breakfast overlooking the coast. Private luxury van to Bangkok airport with souvenir stop.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private departure transfer, artisan souvenir stop

inclusions.text: 04 Nights in handpicked premium family hotels across Bangkok and Pattaya
Private luxury executive van with dedicated chauffeur
VIP airport fast-track reception and Grand Palace guided tour
Private luxury speedboat charter to Coral Island
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and Thailand visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
